commun.slot.placeholder: ← The component will appear here after integration
commun.integration.etape2: 2. Add the import in your .ts file
commun.integration.etape4: 4. Add the tag in the HTML template
accueil.description: This site guides you through integrating the ngx-parrecrivains Angular library into your own project.
accueil.fait.etape1: Angular project created with ng new
accueil.navigation.description: Each page guides you step by step through integrating one element of the library.
tuto.isbn.description: Mathematically validates an ISBN-10 or ISBN-13: format, 978/979 prefix, and check digit.
tuto.isbn.element.manquant: Add isbnValidator() to the FormControl validators array
tuto.isbn.test.champ.label: Tested ISBN value
tuto.isbn.test.erreurs.label: Detected errors
tuto.isbn.probleme.1.symptome: No error despite an incorrect ISBN
tuto.isbn.probleme.1.solution: Add isbnValidator() to the validators array
tuto.isbn.probleme.2.symptome: isbnFormat error on an ISBN with dashes
tuto.mots.description: Formats a word count with singular/plural agreement and typographic thousands formatting based on language.
tuto.mots.element.manquant: Add | mots after the expression in the HTML template
tuto.mots.test.valeur.label: Current value
tuto.mots.probleme.1.cause: The | mots pipe is missing from the template
tuto.mots.probleme.2.symptome: Error: MotsPipe is unknown in the template
tuto.mots.probleme.2.cause: MotsPipe missing from imports: [ ] of the component
tuto.mots.probleme.2.solution: Add MotsPipe to the imports array in @Component
tuto.mots.probleme.3.symptome: I need an unsupported language (e.g. Portuguese, Spanish…)
tuto.mots.probleme.3.cause: Only fr, en and cr have built-in rules — other languages require custom forms
tuto.temps.description: Stateless service for estimating and formatting reading time from a word count.
tuto.temps.element.manquant: Inject TempsLectureService and compute the time in a computed()
tuto.temps.test.mots.label: Word count
tuto.temps.test.resultat.label: Estimated time (after integration)
tuto.temps.probleme.1.cause: TempsLectureService not yet injected in the component
tuto.temps.probleme.1.solution: Add inject(TempsLectureService) and a computed() in tuto-temps-lecture.ts
tuto.liseuse.description: Displays a manuscript with built-in reading controls. Supported formats: plain text, HTML, PDF (File), Google Docs (URL).
tuto.liseuse.element.manquant: Add the tag <ngx-liseuse-manuscrit [contenu]="contenu()" /> in the reserved slot
tuto.liseuse.snippet.usage: 3. HTML tag to place in the template
tuto.liseuse.test.contenu.label: Current content
tuto.liseuse.probleme.1.symptome: The reader doesn't appear on the page
tuto.liseuse.probleme.1.solution: Add the tag in the slot area of tuto-liseuse.html
tuto.liseuse.probleme.2.cause: Parent container has no CSS height defined
tuto.liseuse.probleme.2.solution: Add height: 400px (or similar) on the parent container
tuto.liseuse.probleme.3.cause: The Google Docs document is not shared publicly
tuto.liseuse.probleme.3.solution: In Google Docs: Share → Anyone with the link can view
tuto.isbn.table.caption: Error keys
tuto.isbn.table.erreur.coherence.desc: Format anachronistic with the year (grace period 2005–2006 accepted)
tuto.isbn.erreur.format: Invalid format — enter 10 or 13 digits without dashes.
tuto.isbn.erreur.prefixe: Invalid ISBN-13 prefix — must start with 978 or 979.
tuto.isbn.erreur.checksum: This ISBN number is incorrect (invalid check digit).
tuto.isbn.erreur.coherence: Format inconsistent with the publication year.
tuto.isbn.test.resultat.hint: (No ISBN error shown? → isbnValidator() missing from the FormControl)
tuto.mots.table.signature: Signature: {{ value | words: language : singular : plural }}
tuto.mots.param.langue.desc: Language code: 'fr', 'en', 'cr', or any BCP 47 locale
tuto.temps.methode.formater.desc: Returns a display-ready string — "5 min", "1 h 05 min"
tuto.temps.constante.vitesse.desc: Adult reading speed in words/min — override via vitesseMots if needed
tuto.liseuse.input.contenu.desc: Content to display (text, HTML, PDF, Google Docs URL)
tuto.liseuse.input.titre.desc: Title shown in the info panel
tuto.liseuse.input.auteur.desc: Author shown in the info panel
tuto.liseuse.input.config.desc: Initial configuration (night mode, font size, column width...)
tuto.liseuse.output.readingtime.desc: Active reading seconds (pauses when tab is hidden)
